category_sources: source_facts.description says suite of language analyzers; official FreeLing homepage describes a C++ library and command-line front-end for language analysis and NLP tasks.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub repository use FreeLing; source_facts.name is freeling.
docs_sources: Official FreeLing documentation page links the FreeLing user manuals, technical reference, and tutorial.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/TALP-UPC/FreeLing, so repo enrichment was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe language analyzers, morphological analysis, named entity detection, POS tagging, parsing, C++ library, and CLI front-end.
